title: DBT inward investment results 2024 to 2025
body: "These results detail the inward investment into the UK which landed in the 2024 to 2025 financial year, including the:   number of foreign direct investment (FDI) projects number of FDI projects that DBT supported number of new jobs created in the UK through FDI  number of jobs in the UK safeguarded through FDI  types of FDI in the UK Global Entrepreneur Programme projects aligned to the Ten Point Plan Research & Development (R&D) projects value of venture capital and large capital investment projects   The results include statistics for the FDI which landed in the UK in the 2024 to 2025 financial year by:   region and devolved administration top source market sector   "
